nodes.norm_label: phase p3 geometric feature hybrid meshing

nodes.label: Tier-3 targets (≥5× DOF, ≥3× wall time)
nodes.rationale: SPEC Tier-3 claims measured at equal strain-energy match with same assembly and linear solver; only mesh density strategy changes.

nodes.label: OpenCASCADE B-rep/STEP
nodes.rationale: OCC linked behind POLYMESH_WITH_OCC default-OFF; STL always available for P1–P2. LGPL-2.1 compatible with BSD-3.

nodes.label: STL path (always compiled)
nodes.rationale: Own loader + discrete curvature/dihedral feature detection; input for P1–P2 mesher/solver.

nodes.label: BSD-3-Clause license
nodes.rationale: Supersedes AGPL-3.0; simple OSI-approved, dependency-friendly; CLA/dual-commercial retired.

nodes.label: fea::Element unified trait
nodes.rationale: One trait spans isoparametric FEM p=1..4 and VEM k=1,2 so adaptive loop picks best formulation per region while assembly stays blind.

nodes.label: Virtual Element Method k=1,2
nodes.rationale: Handles non-convex cells and hanging nodes; clean hp theory; stabilization via Tier-0 eigenvalue tests.

nodes.label: hp-adaptivity (order + size)
nodes.rationale: Per-region order selection: cheap low-order in benign regions, high-order where stress accuracy matters.

nodes.label: Wachspress/mean-value polyhedral FEM
nodes.rationale: Rejected primary path: convex-only, effectively first-order; kept as possible cross-check.

nodes.label: Face-based owner/neighbour mesh
nodes.rationale: OpenFOAM-style: flat polygonal faces with owner and optional neighbour; simplest for arbitrary polyhedra, assembly adjacency, ZZ patches, local remesh.

nodes.label: Half-face/half-edge alternative
nodes.rationale: Richer ordered traversal but more code/invariants than assembly, error patches, or local remesh need.

nodes.label: Own uniform tet10 baseline (frozen GATE 1)
nodes.rationale: Self-consistency isolates adaptive mesh strategy; same assembly, solver, error norm. CalculiX is audit cross-check only.

nodes.label: CalculiX audit cross-check
nodes.rationale: Primary baseline would mix mesh strategy with implementation differences; audit catches shared bugs without contaminating metric.

nodes.label: Desktop GUI (GLFW + Dear ImGui + OpenGL)
nodes.rationale: In scope for v1; frontend over same library APIs; no physics logic. Restyled Interwebz v2 clean-room; draft voxel mesher until P2/P3.

nodes.label: Draft voxel mesher v0
nodes.rationale: Until conforming mesher exists, GUI solves on labeled draft voxel mesher for end-to-end import→solve→results.

nodes.label: Interwebz v2 GUI theme
nodes.rationale: Clean-room reimplementation from visual inspection only; reference source unlicensed.

nodes.label: C++20 only (CMake + Ninja)
nodes.rationale: Domain neighbors OpenCASCADE, CUDA, CalculiX, VTK/VTU are native C/C++; RAII, -Werror, Catch2.

nodes.label: CUDA optional backend
nodes.rationale: First-class optional POLYMESH_WITH_CUDA; double precision; every kernel has CPU twin and parity test; CI is CPU-only.

nodes.label: Kirsch plate (SCF=3)
nodes.rationale: Exact Kirsch traction on outer arc makes infinite-plate solution exact on finite annulus; residual is pure discretization.

nodes.label: Goodier cavity
nodes.rationale: Spherical-shell octant, log radial spacing; Saint-Venant Dirichlet stand-in; P1 bar ≤12% SCF error at b/a=15.

nodes.label: L-domain Williams singularity
nodes.rationale: Self-convergence of strain energy under h-halving; rate 2λ≈1.09; peak von Mises grows under refinement.

nodes.label: ADR-0010 Edge vs face mesh store
nodes.norm_label: adr-0010 edge vs face mesh store

nodes.label: Derived edge adjacency index
nodes.rationale: Built on demand from faces if generators need ordered edge walks; not a second source of truth.

nodes.label: Edge-primary topology (rejected)
nodes.rationale: Duplicates polyhedron bounding info; assembly wants faces; two truth sources if faces also stored.

nodes.label: VEM k=1 formulation
nodes.rationale: Constant-strain B-bar via face integrals; stabilization τ μ h (I−Π)ᵀ(I−Π) onto 12-dim linear-displacement space; patch test exact on hex-as-poly.

nodes.label: ADR-0012 Hybrid graded tet + mixed zoo
nodes.norm_label: adr-0012 hybrid graded tet + mixed zoo

nodes.label: graded_tet_fill
nodes.rationale: Size-graded all-tet path: coarse bulk / fine skin + feature/seed bands.

nodes.label: mixed_fill / VolumeMesher::kHybrid
nodes.rationale: Bulk hex8 + skin Kuhn 6×tet4; hex stiffness assembled as Kuhn split for conforming multi-type patch test; default product mesher.

nodes.label: Kuhn 6-tet hex split
nodes.rationale: Shared lattice faces share face diagonal so constant-strain patch is exact with true multi-type elements.

nodes.label: VolumeMesher::kHexPyramid
nodes.rationale: Interior hex8, boundary 6 pyramid5; expand_hex_core_to_pyramids for product FE so patch test exact.

nodes.label: expand_hex_core_to_pyramids
nodes.rationale: Native hex8+pyramid5 fails patch test (bilinear vs piecewise-linear face spaces); all-pyramid5 product path is C1 honesty fix.

nodes.label: Dörfler seed remesh
nodes.rationale: Mark high-η (θ=0.3), centroids as refine_seeds, shrink h, graded fill fine bands near seeds; reuses conforming graded tet without remeshing whole domain to h_min.

nodes.label: Cartesian grid-fill meshers
nodes.rationale: AABB lattice + ray cast + limited snap; not Delaunay/frontal/CAD-aware; do not claim Tier-1 accuracy on product meshes.

nodes.label: Staircasing boundary artifact
nodes.rationale: Free surface follows lattice faces not CAD/STL except limited snap ≤0.75h; residual gap O(h) on curves.

nodes.label: Ray parity shared-edge dedupe
nodes.rationale: Coplanar diagonals double-counted crossings; dedupe within z-ε prevents diagonal tunnels through cubes.

nodes.label: Rivara longest-edge bisection
nodes.rationale: Conforming local refine, no hanging nodes; LEPP walk; output always conforming tet4; seed remesh fallback.

nodes.label: Hanging-node MPCs (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Would touch frozen GATE-1 assembly; deferred in favor of conforming LEB.

nodes.label: VEM k=2 serendipity edge midpoints
nodes.rationale: Vertex+edge-mid DOFs without face/internal moments; order inferred from connectivity n=verts vs verts+edges.

nodes.label: Hex k=2 coincides with hex20 FEM
nodes.rationale: Without face/internal moments pure nodal [P2] fails multi-element residual cancellation; hex serendipity is energy-stable realization on hex meshes.
nodes.norm_label: hex k=2 coincides with hex20 fem

nodes.label: Theme tokens (theme.hpp/cpp)
nodes.rationale: No raw colors in widgets/viewport; single apply function; no physics in apps/gui.

nodes.label: One iteration = one ROADMAP ID
nodes.rationale: Plan acceptance, build+Catch2, full ctest, commit Hunter-124 push master, log progress.

nodes.label: Mesher-solver co-design
nodes.rationale: Mesh adapts type/size/order to geometry and physics: high-fidelity at edges/corners, large cheap elements in bulk.

nodes.label: Patch test is sacred
nodes.rationale: Every element type/order must reproduce constant-strain exactly; breaking patch test cannot merge.

nodes.label: No hardcoded benchmark values in solver
nodes.rationale: Reference values only in bench/reference/; constants matching targets in mesh/adapt/fea are cheating.
nodes.norm_label: no hardcoded benchmark values in solver

nodes.label: Convergence rate is the metric
nodes.rationale: Order-p elements must show O(h^p) energy-norm on MMS; single-mesh target error proves nothing.

nodes.label: Headless pipeline: import → regions → mesh → solve
nodes.norm_label: headless pipeline: import → regions → mesh → solve
